mapper.sql: select session_id, buyer_id, creator_id, creator_user_id, target_type, target_id, target_name, last_message, last_message_time, buyer_unread, creator_unread, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from creative_chat_session
mapper.select: where status = '0' and (buyer_id = #{userId} or creator_user_id = #{userId}) order by ifnull(last_message_time, create_time) desc, session_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into creative_chat_session (buyer_id, creator_id, creator_user_id, target_type, target_id, target_name, last_message, last_message_time, buyer_unread, creator_unread, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{buyerId}, #{creatorId}, #{creatorUserId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{targetName}, #{lastMessage}, #{lastMessageTime}, #{buyerUnread}, #{creatorUnread}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update:
update creative_chat_session
buyer_unread = buyer_unread + 1, update_time = sysdate()
creator_unread = creator_unread + 1, update_time = sysdate()
update_time = update_time
where session_id = #{sessionId}

update creative_chat_session
buyer_unread = 0, update_time = sysdate()
creator_unread = 0, update_time = sysdate()
update_time = update_time
where session_id = #{sessionId}
